programme.howToSee: How participants will see this program
programme.createpageDescription: Publish a single program to the Helixon marketplace.
programme.createdetailsDescription: All fields are required unless marked optional.

dashboard.errorDescription: Unable to load your dashboard. Please try refreshing the page.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we’ll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.confirmDescription: We will send a reset email to {email}
forgotPassword.successDescription: We sent a reset link to {email}

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.
resetPassword.confirmDescription: A reset link will be sent to {email}
resetPassword.successDescriptions: Password reset link has been sent successfully

password.description: Choose a strong password you haven’t used before.

deactivate.title: Deactivate a user account
deactivate.description: Search for a user. Deactivated accounts lose access immediately — data and history are retained and the account can be reactivated from All users.

approveUser.title: Approve User
approveUser.roleHelp: Select the appropriate role for this user.
approveUser.successDescription: The user has been assigned a role and approved successfully.

header.title: Bulk import users
header.description: Upload a CSV to approve pending users and assign roles in one step. Each row is validated before any changes are committed.

formats.label: Supported formats
formats.paidPlanDescription: The .xlsx format is currently only available for customers on a paid plan. Please select .csv or contact support to upgrade.

template.description: Columns: email, role, action · Valid roles: employee · provider · manager · admin · Actions: approve · update

upload.dropLabel: Drop {format} file here or click to browse
upload.hint: .xlsx available on paid plan · Max 50 rows
upload.errorNoData: No valid data found in the file. Ensure it has an "email" column.
upload.errorMaxRows: Maximum 50 rows allowed per batch. Your file contains {count} rows.

review.footerInfo: Preview is read-only. To make corrections, fix the source CSV and re-upload.
review.noteInvalidRole: User not found — will be skipped

confirm.title: Confirm bulk import
confirm.description: This will approve {count} users and assign their roles immediately.
confirm.skippedNote: {count} row(s) with errors will be skipped.
confirm.auditNote: This action is logged in the audit trail and cannot be undone in bulk.

results.successDescription: {count} users have been approved and roles assigned. They will receive login emails shortly.
results.failureDescription: An error occurred during the import process.

bulkProgram.pageDescription: Upload a CSV to create many programs at once.
bulkProgram.pageTitleFull: Bulk Upload Programs | Helixion Training Provider
bulkProgram.sectionDescription: Upload a CSV to create many programs at once. Preview before publishing.
bulkProgram.dropLabel: Drop your CSV here, or click to browse
bulkProgram.expectedColumns: Expected columns: title, startDate, endDate, venue, isResidential, stayType, singleOccupancyFee, twinSharingFee, nonResidentialFee, brochureUrl, minParticipants, maxParticipants, status
bulkProgram.footerHint: Max 500 rows per file - Duplicates will be flagged in preview
bulkProgram.successDescription: {count} programs have been created successfully and are ready for review.
bulkProgram.partialSuccessDescription: {inserted} programs created. {failed} rows had validation errors.
bulkProgram.errorInvalidFile: Please upload a valid CSV file.
bulkProgram.errorEmptyFile: CSV file appears to be empty or invalid.
